name: Black Bean Soup with Sour Cream and Mango Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot. Add enough water to cover the beans.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook until beans are thoroughly cooked.
3. Add more water if needed during cooking.
4. Remove bay leaves from the soup.
5. Puree the soup using a blender or food processor.
6. Pass the pureed soup through a fine-mesh sieve to remove skins of the beans, if desired.
